scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build:all: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:all && cd electron && npm run rebuild && npm run dev
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:all && cd electron && npm run rebuild && npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
